Home RSVP Wedding Party Directions FAQs

FAQs

Everything you need to know

What is the schedule for the day?
3:30 PM - Prelude Concert
Guests are invited to join us at First Church in Marlborough for a prelude concert featuring works by Rachmaninoff, Mendelssohn, Palestrina, Bernstein, and Paul Ayers.

4:00 PM - Wedding Ceremony
The ceremony will begin at First Church in Marlborough.

5:00 PM - Cocktail Hour
Following the ceremony, guests are invited to Sanctuary in Maynard for cocktails and hors d’oeuvres.

6:15 PM - Dinner
Dinner will be served, followed by toasts and celebration.

Dancing to Follow
Can I bring a plus one?

Please refer to your invitation for details regarding your invitation and guest count. Each invitation included a slip listing the individuals who are invited to attend. If a plus one has been extended, it will be indicated there.

To help us accommodate everyone comfortably, we kindly ask that only those named on the invitation attend the celebration.

Are there hotels nearby?

While we do not have a hotel block reserved, there are several convenient lodging options in the Marlborough and Maynard area for guests traveling from out of town. Nearby options include the Hyatt and Best Western, as well as a variety of other hotels within a short drive of the ceremony and reception venues.

Will children be attending the wedding?

While we love your little ones, our wedding will be an adults-only celebration. We kindly ask that only those guests listed on the invitation attend.

We appreciate your understanding and hope you enjoy a relaxing evening celebrating with us.

What will be served for dinner?

Dinner will feature a Brazilian barbecue feast, including pork loin, top sirloin steak, and bacon-wrapped chicken breast, accompanied by rice, beans, and collard greens. For dessert, guests will enjoy cake and passion fruit mousse.

If you have any dietary restrictions, food allergies, or special meal requirements, please let us know so that we can work with our caterer to accommodate your needs.

What is the dress code?

The dress code for our wedding is cocktail attire. We invite guests to dress in semi-formal attire that is elegant and comfortable for both the ceremony and reception. Suits, sport coats, cocktail dresses, dressy separates, and similar attire are all appropriate choices. Most importantly, we hope you'll wear something that makes you feel your best as we celebrate together.

Will the wedding be indoors or outdoors?

Both the ceremony and reception will be held indoors.

The ceremony will take place at First Church in Marlborough, and the reception will be held at Sanctuary in Maynard. Guests will be indoors for all scheduled events, though there will be a brief transition between venues following the ceremony.

I have a question that isn't answered here. Who should I contact?

If you have any additional questions, please don't hesitate to reach out to us:

Timothy
(508) 988-5196

Miguel
(781) 330-8396

We are happy to help and look forward to celebrating with you!
